jobs.prompt: Isolated on a pure plain solid white background, no text, no words, no background, centered, clean edges. A red love heart in the center with a black AR-15 rifle and an over-and-under ball-trap clay shotgun crossed in an X in front of it, bold flat sticker, red and black, clean.
